title: Lettre d'adhésion du Ministre des Affaires étrangères letton. Tampon d'arrivée à NUOI en date du 21/09/1992. La date et le lieu de signature en sont pas spécifiés sur le document.

pages.text:
N° 2579

R7

MINISTEPE DES AFFAIRES ETRENCERES

NATIONS LANIES.

121. SEP. 1992

LET ORGANISAIOAS HERSATGUAGES

or the Republe of Frances lead of Political Affair.

United Nations and International

Organizations Service 37 Quai d'Orsay 75700 PARIS

France

Sir,

European and of Latvia has

Convention and Rules of Redule and agates to contexate to the working costs of the Organization and also its Schedule I.

The Official delegate of Republic of Latvia to EPPO will be Director of the State Plant Protection Station Mr. Gatis Galvinsh

Yours faithfully sons teams Young queria

Minister of Foreign Affair
